playbook.intent: Run a 3-8 team delivery program (typical Outsource enterprise account or P6 multi-squad product) with stable cross-team dependency flow, predictable inter-team handoffs, and one coherent client/product view.
playbook.scope: Run a 3-8 team delivery program (typical Outsource enterprise account or P6 multi-squad product) with stable cross-team dependency flow, predictable inter-team handoffs, and one coherent client/product view.

success-criteria.criterion: Program operating model doc with team missions
Dependency map with named chokepoint owners
Weekly program checkpoint running for 3+ weeks

stage.name: Program structure
stage.intent: Lock the operating model before the first checkpoint.

tasks.task: Define the team-of-teams structure + each team's mission
Build the program RACI for cross-team decisions
Lock the cadence (daily team, weekly program, monthly client)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every team knows its mission and decision rights.

stage.name: Dependency map

tasks.task: Pull each team's planned work for the next 4 sprints
Map cross-team dependencies as a network
Identify chokepoints

stage.decision-gate: Advance when chokepoints have a named owner.

stage.name: Weekly program checkpoint
stage.intent: Stand up the cross-team alignment ritual.

tasks.task: Run a 30-min cross-team checkpoint weekly
Track dependency aging in the program board
Escalate dependencies older than threshold

stage.decision-gate: Advance after 3 weeks of clean checkpoint runs.

stage.name: Predictive read

tasks.task: Track velocity + dependency aging + risk-cost trend
Forecast 2-sprint outlook weekly
Flag deviations early

stage.decision-gate: Advance when forecasts converge with actuals within tolerance.

stage.name: Cross-team team-development

tasks.task: Run a monthly all-program ritual (demo + retro)
Rotate team leads through the program checkpoint
Capture cross-team lessons quarterly

stage.decision-gate: Advance after one full all-program cycle.

stage.name: Client / leadership view
stage.intent: Stitch the team-of-teams into one coherent view.

tasks.task: Build a single program dashboard
Send weekly program note to client + leadership
Hold a monthly steerco

stage.decision-gate: Required: weekly program note continues uninterrupted.

stage.name: Continuous improvement

tasks.task: Quarterly program-level retro
Rotate cross-team handoff scripts based on lessons
Sunset rituals that no longer earn their cost

stage.decision-gate: Required: a quarterly retro is held; no skipping.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content multi-team-coordination-program-continuous-weekly-checkpoints --format md, agent: faion get-content multi-team-coordination-program-continuous-weekly-checkpoints --format context, json: faion get-content multi-team-coordination-program-continuous-weekly-checkpoints --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
